scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter api lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter api test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate reset --force
